source.name: google-10000-english (US no-swears)
source.description: Frequency-ranked from Google's Trillion Word Corpus; upstream swear-filtered list.

supportingSources.name: U.S. Social Security Administration national baby names
supportingSources.selection: Names reaching at least 1,000 births in one year; sexes merged by source mirror.

filtering.exclusions: Upstream swear filter, SSA-derived common personal names, short-token allowlist, technical abbreviations, and regular inflections when an earlier-ranked base exists.
